V-M-028.checks: Alembic migrations apply all migrations on clean database and produce schema consistent with models. Backward compatible with existing SQLModel.create_all behavior during transition period. Phase-29 MTProto assignment migration is registered after baseline with user/SNI uniqueness indexes. Phase-43 adds encrypted MTProto IP observations, admin alerts, and TTL IP block records.
V-M-028.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_db_migrations.py -v

scenarios.scenario: alembic upgrade head applies all migrations on clean database
MTProto assignment migration follows baseline and contains registry schema markers
Phase-43 migration creates IP observation, admin alert, and blocked-IP record tables

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-14: tests/test_db_migrations.py passed as part of Phase-29 target pytest gate.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-20: tests/test_db_migrations.py passed in the Phase-43 backend wave and validates phase43_add_mtproto_ip_observability migration metadata.
